response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience minimum with strong software craftsmanship and entrepreneurial credentials, they lack the demonstrated AI expertise central to the role. Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is promising but insufficient to establish the recognized AI expertise and proven AI product/platform building experience required for a Principal Engineer in AI strategy. No advanced degree in AI, and current Staff-level title does not establish director-level IC positioning.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20 years of progressive software engineering across multiple domains and platforms
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and leadership capabilities through GISCollective founding (2016-present) and initiating training programs (Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses, public speaking)
Strong software engineering fundamentals with visible commitment to craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming) and open source contributions
concerns: Critical absence of demonstrated AI/ML expertise or products—no machine learning projects, deep learning frameworks, or AI platform building mentioned despite this being core to the principal engineer role
No Master's or PhD degree, particularly in AI-related field; background lacks the specialized academic foundation preferred for this strategic AI-focused position

Current Staff-level title and no evidence of director-level individual contributor experience at scale; cloud architecture expertise appears moderate rather than the deep specialization expected for advising on cloud/AI strategy
